task: Block F — reefer hours 15-minute poller cron (additive backend, no money path). The ingest (ingestReeferHoursFromSamsaraForCompany) and reefer-hours tables/routes/UI already existed (mig 0366) but ingest was only reachable via a manual POST. Adds cron/reefer-hours-poll.cron.ts: node-cron */15 per active Samsara-enabled tenant, mirrors samsara-positions-cron exactly (withLuciaBypass, tenant-context guard, set_config, per-tenant audit events, wrapBackgroundJobTick). Env-gated via ENABLE_REEFER_HOURS_POLL_CRON. Registered in index.ts after samsara-positions-cron. Includes a unit test. No DB migration, no money path.
